name: --preset
options.description: What to create in a new workspace (options: "empty", "npm", "web-components", "angular", "angular-nest", "react", "react-express", "react-native", "next", "gatsby", "nest", "express")

suggestions.name: empty
suggestions.description: Empty [an empty workspace with a layout that works best for building apps]

suggestions.name: npm
suggestions.description: Npm [an empty workspace set up to publish npm packages (similar to and compatible with yarn workspaces)]

suggestions.name: web-components
suggestions.description: Web components [a workspace with a single app built using web components]

suggestions.name: angular
suggestions.description: Angular [a workspace with a single Angular application]

suggestions.name: angular-nest
suggestions.description: Angular-nest [a workspace with a full stack application (Angular + Nest)]

suggestions.name: react
suggestions.description: React [a workspace with a single React application]

suggestions.name: react-express
suggestions.description: React-express [a workspace with a full stack application (React + Express)]

suggestions.name: react-native
suggestions.description: React-native [a workspace with a single React Native application]

suggestions.name: next
suggestions.description: Next.js [a workspace with a single Next.js application]

suggestions.name: gatsby
suggestions.description: Gatsby [a workspace with a single Gatsby application]

suggestions.name: nest
suggestions.description: Nest [a workspace with a single Nest application]

suggestions.name: express
suggestions.description: Express [a workspace with a single Express application]

name: --appName
options.description: The name of the application created by some presets

name: --cli
options.description: CLI to power the Nx workspace (options: "nx", "angular")

name: --style
options.description: Default style option to be used when a non-empty preset is selected options: ("css", "scss", "less") plus ("styl") for all non-Angular and ("styled-components", "@emotion/styled", "styled-jsx") for React, Next.js, Gatsby

name: --interactive
options.description: Enable interactive mode when using presets (boolean)

name: --packageManager
--pm
options.description: Package manager to use (npm, yarn, pnpm)
